steps.title: Identify the cost structure
steps.content: The shuttle costs a flat \$840 for the first 4 hours. For each hour beyond 4 hours, there is an additional \$60 charge. With $$t$$ total hours, the extra hours are $$t - 4$$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
Total cost = flat fee + (extra hours) × (hourly rate):
$$840 + 60(t - 4) = 1,080$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘$840(t-4)+60t=1,080$’: Multiplies the flat fee by the variable extra hours, which makes no sense structurally. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘$840(4t)+60t=1,080$’: Also incorrectly multiplies the flat fee by time, and uses total hours for the variable rate. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘$840+60(t-4)=1,080$’: Correctly adds the fixed \$840 to \$60 times the number of hours beyond 4. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘$840+60(4t)=1,080$’: Uses $$4t$$ instead of $$(t-4)$$ for extra hours — that would quadruple the total time, not subtract the first 4 hours. ✗
That confirms C. — C is correct.
